answer: We offer free shipping on all orders nationwide! Delivery takes 3 to 5 business days. We ship to all major cities in Pakistan including Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, and Peshawar.
We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all products. The item must be unused and in original packaging. Contact our support team to start a return request.
We accept two payment methods: Cash on Delivery (COD) where you pay when your order arrives, and Credit/Debit Card via Stripe for secure online payment.
You can track your order by logging in and visiting the My Orders page. Order statuses are: Pending, Confirmed, Shipped, Delivered, and Cancelled.
Orders can be cancelled before they are shipped. Please contact our support team as soon as possible to cancel your order.
You can create an account by clicking Sign In and registering with your name, email and password. Login to access your orders, cart and checkout.
All prices are in Pakistani Rupees (Rs). There are no hidden taxes — the price you see is the final price. Shipping is always free.
You can browse all products on the Products page. Use the search bar at the top to find specific products. Click any product to see details, price, and stock availability.
Add products to your cart from any product page. View your cart by clicking the cart icon in the navbar. Checkout requires your name, email, phone, and delivery address.
Our customer support is available 24/7 via this chat. For returns, cancellations, or complaints, contact our support team and we will assist you as soon as possible.
Admin users have access to the Admin Dashboard where they can manage products, view orders, track revenue, and see analytics.
Hello! 👋 I'm the E-Shop support assistant. I can help you with shipping, returns, payments, order tracking, cancellations, and general store questions. What do you need help with?
